subcodes.first_line: O thou tender and cherished branch of the divine Lote-Tree, I have perused the contents of thy noble letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع اللطیف الحبیب من السدره الرحمانیه قد اطلعت بمضامین کتابک الکریم و
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
